summary: CEO session load reduced 95% (40→2 cron jobs) by redistributing to 7 agents: supervisor-core(22), board-auditor(4), board-operator(3), board-visionary(1), pharmacy-hq(4), research-analyst(3), ops-automator(1). First distributed board cycle confirmed all agents healthy.
All 25 agents fully unified to GLM-5-Turbo including agent body, heartbeat, subagents, and defaults. Zero gpt-5.4-mini references remain in config. Applied via gateway config.patch with restart.

Board cycle changed from every 2 hours to hourly (14 cron jobs from */2 to *). Slot contract also fixed from HH:35 to HH:20 (seed generation time) to resolve perpetual stale_input in precheck. Post-fix: seed and precheck are fresh at current slot, but board-premeeting-brief remains stale at 20260328-0235.

Token management system implemented with 3-mode adaptive scheduling (eco/normal/high-efficiency), 15-min monitoring, and auto mode switching. Tuned from v1 to v6 after initial over-conservative buffer (20%→10%) and notification policy corrections (announce→none except mode switch). System is live with 2 cron jobs.

Pharma-free-tools Phase 3 deployed: 3 new tools (服薬カレンダー, 医師連絡文面, 在宅ケアチーム情報共有) with SharedPatientStore integration, mobile-first design, SEO, and localStorage persistence. All pushed to GitHub Pages. Claude Code handoff mechanism (completion-latest.md + 3-min checker) validated during this deployment.

Self-improvement verification shows manual_required increased from 1 to 2 (freshness contract + cron consolidation). 5 phantom proposals still not_found on filesystem across 2 consecutive cycles. Success rate: 8/21=38.1%. Stagnation rate: 4/21=19.0%.

Autonomy KPI outcome review identified a key pattern: board meeting chain runs succeed but outcomes stall (stale_input chain, approval gates). Key finding: board freshness should be a separate KPI from run success. sidebiz/polymarket have research output but no PoC connection. polymarket recommended for hold/stop pending compliance matrix.
